rows.name: Forward guard jab
rows.primary_input: J/Z/L first ground light or Y
rows.combo_role: Fast opener with short forward commitment.
rows.gameplay: Small hitstop, low recovery, starts the light chain.

rows.name: Rising hook slash
rows.primary_input: J/Z/L second ground light or U
rows.combo_role: Mid-chain vertical cover and anti-hop check.
rows.gameplay: Slightly larger hitbox and stronger push than row 1.

rows.name: Piercing arm thrust
rows.primary_input: J/Z/L third ground light or I
rows.combo_role: Linear finisher that reaches past normal knife range.
rows.gameplay: Highest light-chain knockback and readable thrust timing.

rows.name: Low red sweep
rows.primary_input: O on grounded direct row select
rows.gameplay: Keeps the body grounded while the slash VFX covers both sides.

rows.name: Overhead crescent launcher
rows.primary_input: P on grounded direct row select
rows.gameplay: Longer visible arc, used when the player explicitly selects row 5.

rows.name: Shoulder cleave
rows.gameplay: More damage, larger camera impulse, harder hitstop than light.

rows.name: Vertical breaker
rows.gameplay: Extends vertical coverage without pulling the player down.

rows.name: Crimson lance thrust
rows.gameplay: Strong horizontal knockback and broad active slash.

rows.name: Low cyclone breaker
rows.gameplay: Keeps low stance and favors width over launch.

rows.name: Crimson eruption
rows.gameplay: Largest heavy VFX read; current hitbox uses heavy preset bounds.

rows.name: Air guard slash
rows.primary_input: J/Z/L while airborne or airborne Y
rows.combo_role: Air opener that stabilizes the player in place.
rows.gameplay: Adds a small upward hold to keep the combo readable.

rows.name: Air thrust
rows.gameplay: Horizontal drift with modest launch preservation.

rows.name: Dive slash
rows.gameplay: Uses the air preset, so it reads as attack commitment instead of falling.

rows.name: Aerial red ring
rows.gameplay: Wide circular VFX with preserved vertical hang time.

rows.name: Meteor drop
rows.gameplay: Big landing read, still bounded by the air combo preset.

rows.name: Forward burst slash
rows.gameplay: Protected forward momentum so idle movement cannot cancel the dash.

rows.name: Low slide slash
rows.gameplay: Forward momentum with slight upward safety to avoid floor sinking.

rows.name: Substitution burst
rows.runtime_style: MobilityRefRow(3) semantic, player body uses MobilityRefRow(1)
rows.combo_role: Backward evasive burst with afterimage streaks.
rows.gameplay: No extra player entity; abstract VFX represents the split-image action.

rows.name: Wall kick launch
rows.runtime_style: MobilityRefRow(4) semantic, player body uses MobilityRefRow(2)
rows.gameplay: Preserves upward launch and uses abstract VFX for the generated wall row.

rows.name: Fire shot
rows.gameplay: Warm colored projectile, medium speed, larger damage than default magic.

rows.name: Wind wave
rows.gameplay: Fastest projectile row with wide horizontal collision.

rows.name: Lightning pillar
rows.gameplay: Tall collision and slower travel for a column-hit read.

rows.name: Shadow clone slash
rows.runtime_style: NinjutsuRefRow(4) semantic, player body uses NinjutsuRefRow(1)
rows.gameplay: Spawns abstract afterimages and VFX, never duplicate player bodies.

rows.name: Sword rain field
rows.gameplay: Large hitbox, long lock floor, strong hitstop and camera impulse.

rows.name: Crimson cross beam
rows.gameplay: Heavy knockback and high commitment.

rows.name: Golden projection field
rows.gameplay: Uses the ultimate preset bounds while the atlas carries the visual scale.

rows.name: Short sword materialize
rows.gameplay: Moderate damage with short windup and forward nudge.

rows.name: Twin blade projection
rows.gameplay: Wider slash read than row 1.

rows.name: Long sword projection
rows.gameplay: Extends hitbox and knockback through the weapon projection preset.

rows.name: Bow projection
rows.gameplay: Manual visual finisher with controlled melee collision for now.
